content.en:
New universe, in front of the ancestral monument.

Ye Tian and the other gods and the earth lords looked at the ancestral monument standing on the earth, and they were all dumbfounded.

I don't recognize it!

They also don't know what this ancestral monument is.

It was hundreds of millions of feet high, and the whole body was pitch black, but there was a golden light coming out of the body, and countless terrifying rule forces burst out, making it impossible for them to get close at all.

Suddenly.

This golden light and rules slowly evolved into a list - the list of god generals!

Soon, names appeared on the list of gods.

No. 1 on the list of god generals: Wanfa god general, four-star early god general

No. 2 on the list of god generals: Phantom Feather God General, a three-star early god general

No. 3 on the list of god generals: Long Ze god general, two-star peak god general

No. 4 on the list of god generals: Furukawa god general, two-star peak god general

No. 5 on the list of god generals: unparalleled god generals, two-star peak god generals

No. 6 on the list of god generals: Blood Cloud God General, two-star late stage God General

No. 7 on the list of god generals: Canglong God General, two-star late God General

......

No. 41 on the list of god generals: Yuan Gu god general, one-star mid-term god general

......

There are a total of 47 gods on the god generals list, of which the Yuan Gu God will be ranked 41st, and the stone dragon god will be ranked 46th, and their ranking can be described as very low.

Most of the gods on the list are the gods of the Cangyu universe and the gods of the Tibetan God Organization, but the most dazzling is Ye Tian, the strength of the four-star early stage god generals crushes everything.

This list came out and caused a huge sensation.

Because this list is equivalent to indirectly exposing the strength of the gods, some gods are very hidden, and others think that they are a waste material, but they didn't expect the strength to be very strong.

For example, the third place on the god list of dragon ze god generals and the fifth place unequaled god general, the strength of these two people is rumored to be only a one-star god general, but now it shows that they are two-star god generals, and they are both two-star peak god generals.

At this time.

The Canglong Divine General was also looking at this list, and when he saw that he was only in seventh place, he was stunned.

"I'm only seventh?"

The Canglong God will be a little incredulous.

He has had a lot of opportunities during this time, and his strength has improved rapidly, and he is about to step into the ranks of two-star peak gods, thinking that he can at least rank in the top five, but he didn't expect to be ranked seventh.

"Long Ze Divine General and Wushuang Divine General, these two guys have always been very low-key, and they have always shown the strength of a one-star divine general, I didn't expect to see it wrong, I really underestimated them!"

Thinking about it, the Canglong Divine General looked at the Longze Divine General and the Peerless Divine General in the distance.

And at this moment, the faces of the Long Ze God General and the Peerless God General changed one after another.

They thought they were well hidden, but they didn't expect to be exposed by the ancestral monument.

Seeing that it was exposed, they no longer hid their aura, and the aura belonging to the peak of the two stars leaked out.

When the gods revealed all the lists on the list, a golden light was integrated into the body of a god general, and Ye Tian was also integrated into a golden light.

This golden light contains some information, it is a message about this ancestral monument.

"Ancestral Monument!"

Ye Tian knew the name of this tablet and also knew its origin.

"Nine places, the opportunity to achieve the right way!"

Ye Tian's pupils shrank sharply.

Only then did he understand what a great opportunity this was, it was simply beyond any chance in the entire universe, and it was even enough to make the hearts of Dao Ancestors in the Merge Dao realm move, and it was enough to make countless ancient True Ancestors crazy!

Although this opportunity is still very far away, and it can even be said that it doesn't matter, but this great opportunity appeared in the new universe where the Eternal Universe and the Cangyu Universe merged, which meant that the value here instantly increased countless times.

However, at present, this ancestral monument is also extremely valuable to Ye Tian and them, because of the god general list bred by this ancestral monument.

The top 100 gods will have a big chance, but no one knows what the specific big chance is.

Of course, the current ancestral monument has only been conceived, and it has not even really taken shape, only the moment when the dual universe becomes a large universe, the ancestral monument is the real ancestral monument, and it has great power.

Chaos.

An ancient true ancestor has arrived, some true ancestors are in the early stage of the Great Dao, some are in the middle of the Great Dao, and even the ancient true ancestors at the peak of the Great Dao have arrived.

Of course, most of the True Ancestors and Dao Ancestors in the chaos would not come, because there was no need, and they couldn't do anything if they came.

However, some of these True Ancestors were ordered by Dao Ancestors, and some were relatively close, so they came to see them by the way.

"The god generals list is out, this is a real big opportunity for the god generals, but it's a pity that I have already surpassed this level, and I can't enjoy this opportunity at all!"

A True Ancestor in the early stage of the Great Dao sighed.

"Hahaha, Yuhe True Ancestor, the Divine General List can't be on the Divine Ancestor List, but we can be on the True Ancestor List in the future! That is the real big opportunity, even if we don't grab those nine places, but if we can enter the True Ancestor List, our strength will skyrocket!"

"It's a pity that the dual universes are still in the process of merging, and we can't send the god-level disciples in, otherwise there will be a large number of god-level generals pouring into this future universe in the chaos!"

An Ancient Dao Peak True Ancestor muttered.

"Red River True Ancestor, you are the True Ancestor of Shadow, one of the Transcendental forces, the chance of the dual universe merging into a large universe is too low, you Shadow should take out an Origin Universe Heart and integrate it into the dual universe to help it become a great universe!"

The one who spoke was also a Dao Peak True Ancestor, named Lan Gu True Ancestor, and although the strength of the Red River True Ancestor was only in the late stage of the Great Dao, it was from one of the transcendent forces, and his status was naturally very high.

Honghe True Ancestor smiled and said: "How precious is the Origin Universe Heart, we don't have a few Shadow Hearts, if you want us to take it out, you don't pay any price, is it possible? Let's take out the Origin Universe Heart, when this Great Universe takes shape, if you want to enter the Great Universe, the quota must be determined by us, if you want to enter, you must pay some price, how?"

"Yes!"

Some True Ancestors nodded in agreement.

They don't have the ability to make the dual universe a big universe, only the transcendent forces can do it, so let the Shadow pay the heart of the origin universe to create the big universe, and they will naturally have no problem paying some price.

"At what cost, you can't offer a price all over the sky, right?"

Lan Gu True Ancestor asked.

"1 Dao Coin enters a Divine General, and 100 Dao Coin enters a Heavenly Mandate True Monarch. As for the Great Universe after it becomes the Dao Realm, it is no longer restricted. Red River True Ancestor proposed.

Dao Coins are the currency in the chaos, and many gods can't exchange all their net worth for a Dao Coins, but for the True Ancestors, a few Dao Coins are nothing.

"Yes!"

Lan Gu True Ancestor agreed, because the price proposed by Red River True Ancestor was very reasonable, and it was just a small amount of money, so they didn't care.

However, the more Divine Generals and Heavenly Mandate True Monarchs entered, the more Dao Coins Shadow would get, which would be enough to make up for the loss.

In short, it's a win-win situation.
